description: op-to-op latency CI golden (Blackhole, bh_p150_perf). Runs under TT_METAL_PROFILER_ACCUMULATE=1 so the per-program L1->DRAM profiler dump does not land in the op2op gap (reviewer request: otherwise the gap is inflated by profiler writeout). Both metrics are null = record mode while we collect the accumulate baseline on CI; re-arm once stable. Pre-accumulate device-profiler baselines were official_op2op_us=2.069, pack_to_unpack_op2op_us=4.255.
